title: Assistant Engineering Manager
description:
Assistant Engineering Manager


About this opportunity

We are seeking an Assistant Engineering Manager to support our Engineering Manager in delivering exceptional facility operations and maintenance services. This role offers the opportunity to work with cutting-edge building systems while developing technical and leadership skills in a dynamic commercial real estate environment.

What this job involves

  • Supporting daily operations, You'll assist in overseeing building operations including HVAC, electrical, plumbing, and life safety systems. Your role involves monitoring building performance, coordinating maintenance activities, and ensuring continuous operation to maintain optimal tenant experience.

  • Driving maintenance excellence, You'll support preventive and corrective maintenance programs, working closely with contractors and service providers to schedule repairs and upgrades. You'll help track maintenance costs and vendor performance to ensure efficient operations.

  • Managing finance compliance, You’ll assist in supervising purchase recommendation submission. You’ll help to ensure finance tracker are kept up to date. You’ll assist in Ensuring all purchasing activities follow company policies and legal regulations while assessing risks like supplier instability. 

  • Ensuring compliance standards, You'll assist in maintaining building systems compliance with local codes, regulations, and safety standards. This includes supporting inspections, certifications, and regulatory reporting to protect occupants and assets.

  • Managing improvement projects, You'll help plan and execute building enhancement projects, coordinating with contractors, vendors, and internal stakeholders. Your role ensures projects are delivered on time, within budget, and to JLL's quality standards.

  • Developing our people, You'll support the training and development of maintenance staff, assist in performance management, and help maintain our high service delivery standards that clients expect from JLL.

What we're looking for

  • Technical foundation Diploma in Facilities Management, Building Engineering, or related technical field with minimum 5 years of experience in facilities management, building operations, or engineering services.

  • Core competencies Strong technical knowledge of building systems and equipment, excellent communication and organizational abilities, proficiency in computerized maintenance management systems (CMMS), and proven problem-solving skills with attention to detail.

  • Leadership potential Basic project management capabilities and ability to support team development initiatives while maintaining JLL's commitment to service excellence.

What's in it for you

Join JLL's dynamic engineering team and contribute to maintaining world-class commercial properties while developing your career in facilities management. This role offers growth opportunities, technical challenges, and the chance to work with industry-leading building systems and technologies.

postedCompany.description:
JONES LANG LASALLE PROPERTY CONSULTANTS PTE LTD

About Jones Lang LaSalle

Jones Lang LaSalle (NYSE:JLL) is a professional services and investment management firm offering specialized real estate services to clients seeking increased value by owning, occupying and investing in real estate. With annual revenue of US$4.0 billion, Jones Lang LaSalle operates in 70 countries from more than 1,000 locations worldwide. On behalf of its clients, the firm provides management and real estate outsourcing services to a property portfolio of 3.0 billion square feet. Its investment management business, LaSalle Investment Management, has US$47.6 billion of real estate assets under management.

Jones Lang LaSalle has over 50 years of experience in Asia Pacific, with over 27,500 employees operating in 80 offices in 15 countries across the region. The firm was named ‘Best Property Consultancy’ in three Asia Pacific countries at the International Property Awards Asia Pacific 2013, and won nine Asia Pacific awards in the Euromoney Real Estate Awards 2013. www.ap.joneslanglasalle.com
